programme.title: The Ashes Live
programme.desc: Australia v England. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the five-match series, which takes place at Optus Stadium in Perth. Of the 13 Ashes series this century, the hosts have won six and the visitors have won five, with the other two ending in draws. The previous series in 2023 ended in a draw as England came from 2-0 down to draw the series 2-2 thanks to victories in the Third and Fifth Tests

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: Live Test: India v South Africa
programme.desc: India v South Africa. Coverage of the third day of the Second and Final Test of the series, which takes place at ACA Stadium in Guwahati. The hosts are searching for their first series victory over South Africa since a 3-0 victory in India in October 2019. However that series win was one of only two victories for India against their visitors in 10 series stretching back to 2004, so Shubman Gill's side will be hoping for some success here to improve that record

programme.title: The Ashes Live
programme.desc: Australia v England. Coverage of the fifth and final day of the First Test in the five-match series, which takes place at Optus Stadium in Perth. England haven't beaten Australia in the opening Test of the series in Australia since they came away with a seven-wicket victory back in November 1986. That win came in a series that England won 2-1 as they won down under for the first time since 1978/79

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: Live Test: India v South Africa
programme.desc: India v South Africa. Coverage of the fourth day of the Second and Final Test of the series, which takes place at ACA Stadium in Guwahati. The last Test series between these two teams ended in a 1-1 draw in January 2024, as India fought back to level a two-match contest. South Africa won the First Test by an innings and 32 runs in Centurion before India came out on top in the second game thanks to a seven-wicket win
